top_signals.title: How Japan created its naphtha supply bottleneck
top_signals.summary: With no end in sight for the Iran war, supply chain bottlenecks for the oil-derived material are set to continue, prompting calls for government-enforced energy saving measures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Migrants rescued from burning trailer after South Texas smuggling chase
top_signals.summary:
Law officers rescued 39 suspected undocumented migrants from a locked trailer that caught fire Thursday during a pursuit in South Texas.

The post Migrants rescued from burning trailer after South Texas smuggling chase  appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: Meta's stock sinks on report company could raise tens of billions of dollars to fund AI push
top_signals.summary: Meta shares dropped after the Financial Times reported that company could potentially raise tens of billions of dollars in a stock offering to help its AI push.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The dollar’s decline is overstated — but still real
top_signals.summary: The most reliable measure of dollar dominance is probably the loans and other dollar obligations created outside US

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto tax in Illinois FY2027 budget is one step away from becoming law
top_signals.summary: The law, part of a budget plan passed by Illinois lawmakers, would put the burden of collecting a 0.2% tax on crypto transactions on a registered broker.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kraken offers SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
top_signals.summary: Eligible users in more than 110 markets can register for tokenized SpaceX equity ahead of the company's highly anticipated public listing.
